key_findings: CASH_APP is a non-standard database prefix at Block — the standard is APP_CASH (reversed). This is the primary cause of the mystery.
No Notion, Linear, or Slack documentation found for CASH_APP.RISK.TXN_FLAGGED_EVENTS under that exact name.
Closest confirmed real table: APP_RISK.APP_RISK.SQ_RISK_FLAGGED_EVENTS (Squarewave Job 39524, DRI: eaiello).
That table is tagged Pending Auto-Migration in Linear (SW2CAT-1891) — migration from Squarewave to Catalyst is active.
For Cash App fraud model work, APP_CASH.APP.RISK_ML_SCORED_EVENTS is the canonical unified table (documented in Notion).
Slack auth expired — manual follow-up in #app-risk-squarewave-sentry-alerts recommended.
